title: Glass Frosting 300ml Decoration Security & Privacy
features: Creates a translucent frosted effect on glass or mirror surfaces.
Also great for stencil effects on glass, mirrors or glass objects such as vases or decorative accessories.
For best result, put the can in warm water for 15-20 minutes before use to ensure a good paint flow
description: Size: 300ml. Finish: Matt. Colour: White Translucent Frosted Effect. Paint Type: Aerosol. Creates a translucent frosted effect on glass or mirror surfaces.Ideal for bathroom windows, glass door panels and skylights. Also great for stencil effects on glass, mirrors or glass objects such as vases or decorative accessories. For best result, put the can in warm water for 15-20 minutes before use to ensure a good paint flow.
